title: On load, Saved Themes (or the saved list after opening that tab) shows at least 3 seeded theme rows with names visible
After creating a saved theme named 'Harbor Indigo' with valid required fields, the text 'Harbor Indigo' is visible under Saved Themes
After adding 3 new saved themes on top of the seed set, Saved Themes shows exactly 3 more rows than the initial seeded count
After loading a saved theme, the Preview surfaces and/or Monaco editor reflect that theme's options
After editing a saved theme name to 'Evening Paper', the text 'Evening Paper' is visible and the previous name is not
After deleting a saved theme, that theme name is no longer visible under Saved Themes
After deleting all saved themes, an empty state message is visible in the Saved Themes region
After submitting create with an empty required theme name, the saved themes count does not increase and validation feedback is visible
After toggling Light/Dark palette Type, preview surfaces recolor without full page navigation
After switching from Preview to Saved Themes (or Components), the main canvas shows the other mode without full page navigation
After switching among Phone / Tablet / Desktop device frames, the preview chrome reframes without leaving the page
When hovering buttons, saved theme rows, or tabs, a visible hover wash, underline, or brightness change appears
